body_txt: Being a caregiver is one of the most selfless things you can do. To care for another person either temporarily or permanently takes a very strong and patient person. Obviously, the caregiver has or had more than just this role beforehand or during their new position. It could be they had a successful and/or fulfilling career or academic standing before their loved one got sick or injured. As such, this is a sacrifice for all involved and to be an attentive and effective caregiver, they have to leave their position to do their duty. Needless to say, this is Truth in Television . Sub-trope of The Caretaker . Caregiver Angst can happen if they feel overwhelmed by the position, and Caretaker Reversal can occur if the carer themselves gets sick with the same disease or something else and their patient either takes care of them or at least attempts to. Related to Parents as People , Family Versus Career , Call to Agriculture , and Quitting to Get Married . May overlap with Retired Badass . Keep in mind that this differs from a woman (or less commonly, a man ) who becomes a stay-at-home Mom/Dad from having a previous career after becoming a parent: the person is caring for someone who has been sick or injured.
